case_title: PETER B. SANDMAN VS. LARRY LIONETTI et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ATTY-CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION AWARD - (AMENDED) FILED BY PETITIONER SANDMAN, PETER B.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PETER SANDMAN'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ATTORNEY-CLIENT FEE ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER SANDMAN, PETER B. RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT LIONETTI, LARRY LIONETTI, LENA $24,551.56 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $24,551.56, SEE SCANNED DOC

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER PETER SANDMAN'S Motion To Confirm Attorney-Client Fee Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
